big4_audit_readiness.note: Both scores above 70% — suitable for Big4 pre-audit gap analysis. Full audit requires ≥80%.

activation_checklist: Publish ISMS_POLICY.md (closes ISO-A5.1 gap — biggest ISO27001 gap)
Create risk_register table with quarterly review cycle (closes CLAUSE6_PLANNING)
Configure DD_API_KEY for Datadog EU monitoring (closes S-CC7.1 to IMPLEMENTED)
Integrate Snyk or GitHub Dependabot CVE scanning in CI (closes ISO-A8.8)
Document quarterly management security review process (closes ISO-9.3)
Run GET /api/compliance/regulatory to get live scores with real DB data
